title: CompetencyPerson
description: A Person node — the bearer of a competency. Connected to competencies via the 'has_competency' relation (which carries the assessment) and may own an area via 'owned_by'. May reference an external people registry (e.g. users.json) through 'ref' instead of duplicating identity data.

id.description: Person identifier. Grammar: 'person:' prefix + dot-separated slug levels, each matching [a-z0-9-] (e.g. 'person:jane-doe').

ref.description: Optional key into an external people registry (e.g. a users.json id) that is the source of truth for identity
